rationale: Adds a single new file `.copilot-review/result.md` (69 lines) containing a Renovate dependency-risk assessment for the Loki Helm chart bump 16.0.1 → 17.1.1. The document includes a structured verdict (Yellow Caution / Merge after checks / High confidence), an update inventory table, line-by-line upstream-change analysis with linked grafana-community/helm-charts PRs (#366 MinIO deprecation, #515 ipFamilyPolicy, #514 zone-suffix fix, #448 null-replica fix, #502 workload helpers, #520 monolithic helper), a local-impact section noting SingleBinary mode and external S3 via `observability-s3` secret, and a pre-merge checklist. It is pure review documentation produced for issue #217; no code or config logic changes; nothing to cheat on. Closed-without-merge is not informative about correctness here (review-doc PRs are routinely closed once consumed).
